name: ctx0-monorepo
description: ctx.0 — security-first scaffolder for a Flutter app + .NET API

scripts.build: npm run build -w @ctx0/core && npm run build -w @ctx0/engine-server && npm run build -w ctx0
scripts.test:node: npm run test:node -w @ctx0/core && npm run test -w @ctx0/engine-server && npm run test -w ctx0
scripts.lint: npm run build -w @ctx0/core && npm run lint --workspaces --if-present
